item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response treats the prompt as a logistics decision analysis problem, not as an N+1/local-repair triage trigger. It provides a direct framework: define the decision, segment metrics, build attribution, set switching thresholds, test with limited rollout, and decide based on evidence. No triage false fire or over-methodized stop is present."}
